title: Sqlitelogictest aritmetic expressions with negative numbers handling
poc:
SELECT + - 36 * - + 33 * - + 49 * + CASE 50 WHEN - 21 + 0 + - COUNT ( * ) THEN NULL
 WHEN + 99 * - 43 + - - 35 THEN - 75 ELSE NULL END * - - 51 * + 0 AS col2;
key_bug_features: Handling arithmetic expressions with negative numbers
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value DECIMAL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, -10.5, 'Negative value test');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (2, 0, 'Zero value test');
SELECT id, value * -1 AS negated_value FROM test_table WHERE value < 0;
SELECT id, value + (SELECT -5 FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS adjusted_value FROM test_table;
